betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Quartz Grindstone converts Certus Quartz, Nether Quartz, and Fluix Crystals into their dust forms. Place it down and insert items manually or via hoppers.

Recipes:
Certus Quartz Crystal → 2× Certus Quartz Dust
Nether Quartz → 2× Nether Quartz Dust
Fluix Crystal → 2× Fluix Dust

Power the grindstone with a Wooden Crank attached to its side, or supply rotational power from other mods. Each grind takes 40 ticks (2 seconds).

Tip: Build multiple grindstones early. Dust production is a bottleneck for circuit and processor crafting.
